footer.disclaimer: PlanPal supports your professional plan — it never replaces your nutritionist.

hero.title: Follow your nutrition plan with less stress
hero.subtitle: Approved swaps, meal ideas and shopping lists — all grounded in the plan your professional created for you.

plan.label: Active plan
plan.demoNotes: Higher protein at breakfast, lighter evenings.

assistant.heading: Ask PlanPal
assistant.subtitle: Questions are answered from your active plan — never invented.
assistant.previewNote: Preview only — the assistant is not wired up yet.

shopping.heading: Shopping list
shopping.subtitle: Built from your meals and default options for the week.

clientQuestions.title: Client questions
clientQuestions.subtitle: See what clients ask most — and improve future plans.

activeClients.title: Active clients
activeClients.subtitle: People currently following one of your plans.

planEditor.title: Plan editor
planEditor.subtitle: Build structured plans: meals → food slots → approved options.

questions.q1: Can I replace the egg whites at breakfast?
questions.q2: What can I order if I'm eating out tonight?
questions.q3: What should I buy for tomorrow's meals?

builder.title: Plan builder
builder.subtitle: Create a client, structure their plan, and see exactly what they'll see.

plan.heading: Plan details
plan.notesPlaceholder: Short note shown with the plan

meals.heading: Meals
meals.subtitle: Add the meals in this plan.
meals.empty: No meals yet. Add the first meal to start building the plan.

slots.heading: Food slots
slots.subtitle: A slot is a part of the meal the client fills with one approved option.
slots.empty: No food slots in this meal yet.

options.heading: Approved options
options.subtitle: The client may pick any one of these.
options.empty: No options yet. Add at least one approved option.
options.nutritionHint: Optional. Macros power the replacement engine; they are never invented.

preview.heading: Client preview
preview.subtitle: What your client sees
preview.draftNotice: Draft — your client can't see this yet.
preview.noMeals: Add meals and options to see the client view here.

validation.heading: Before this plan is ready
validation.optionName: Every option needs a food name.
validation.allGood: Looks good — this plan is complete.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Access your professional area.
auth.mustSignIn: You must sign in to continue.

notConfigured.title: Firebase not configured
notConfigured.body: Set the NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* variables in apps/web/.env.local to enable sign-in.

errors.tooMany: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.session: Signed in, but couldn't start a secure session. Please try again.
errors.generic: Could not sign in. Please try again.

planAssistant.title: PlanPal Assistant
planAssistant.subtitle: Ask about the saved plan — approved options, swaps, summaries. Answers come only from the plan.
planAssistant.disclaimer: PlanPal answers only from the saved plan — no medical advice, no new diets.
planAssistant.noPlan: Save a plan first to use the assistant.
planAssistant.error: The assistant couldn't answer right now. Please try again.
planAssistant.empty: Ask a question to see a plan-grounded answer here.
chips: What are the approved options for lunch protein?
Can the client swap the breakfast yogurt?
Summarise this plan in simple language.
Make a shopping list from this plan.

replacements.title: Replacement engine
replacements.subtitle: Find replacement candidates from your saved plan and approved groups, and manage your replacement groups. Candidates always need your review before a client sees them.
replacements.findSubtitle: Pick a food from the saved plan and see classified candidates.
replacements.runHint: Pick a food and run the search.
replacements.insufficientData: Not enough nutritional data to suggest a replacement safely.
replacements.noPlan: Save a plan first to find replacements.
replacements.candidateNote: Candidate for professional review — not automatically approved for the patient.
replacements.approveSafety: Approving this candidate will add it to the client's approved options for this meal slot.
replacements.error: Couldn't run the search. Try again.
replacements.groupsSubtitle: Interchangeable foods (with macros) the engine can suggest as candidates.
replacements.noGroups: No replacement groups yet. Add one to define interchangeable foods.
replacements.toleranceHint: Initial MVP defaults — not clinical rules. Used to judge nutritional similarity.
replacements.noMembers: No foods yet. Add interchangeable foods with their macros.

patientPreview.title: Your plan
patientPreview.subtitle: A preview of what your client sees. Tap a food to find what they could eat instead.
patientPreview.previewBanner: Client preview — this is how your client sees their plan.
patientPreview.empty: No plan to preview yet. Build and save a plan first.
patientPreview.genericSentence: What can you use instead of {food} {amount}?
patientPreview.askProfessionalNote: Not approved in your plan yet. Ask your professional before using it.
patientPreview.noAmount: Amount to discuss with your professional
patientPreview.noCandidates: No alternatives to show here. Ask your professional if you need a swap.
patientPreview.insufficient: We can't suggest a safe swap here. Ask your professional.
patientPreview.showNotMatch: Show options that aren't a good match
patientPreview.hideNotMatch: Hide options that aren't a good match

reasons.similar_role: similar role to your planned food
reasons.too_different: too different for this part of your plan

patientChat.title: Chat with PlanPal
patientChat.subtitle: Ask about your plan and what you can eat instead — a preview of the patient experience.
patientChat.previewBanner: Client preview — professional control. Not shown to patients in production.
patientChat.inputPlaceholder: Ask about a food… e.g. "What can I eat instead of Greek yogurt?"
patientChat.greeting: Hi! Tell me a food in your plan you'd like to swap and I'll show what you can use.
patientChat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
patientChat.noPlan: There's no plan to chat about yet.
patientChat.whatInsteadTemplate: What can I eat instead of {food}?
patientChat.askProfessionalNote: Not approved in your plan yet — check with your professional.
patientChat.exploratoryWarning: Not approved in your plan yet

reasons.similar_role: similar role to your planned food
reasons.too_different: too different for this part of your plan
